image_path: case_library/poster/case_037_目标：促收藏，给美甲师看的总结。 美甲笔/image.png
brief: 目标：促收藏，给美甲师看的总结。 美甲笔记总结图，关键信息卡片风格。 用户需求：夏日蓝色猫眼短甲，适合黄皮，显白清透，小红书种草图文。 视觉简报：展示夏日蓝色猫眼短甲的视觉效果，强调适合黄皮肤色的显白清透效果，搭配短方圆形状，适合小红书种草分享。。 手型：自然亚洲女性手型。 肤色：黄皮。 甲型：短方圆。 甲长：短甲。 主色调：蓝色。 质感：猫眼。 光线：清透。 背景：夏日氛围。 风格：显白。 小红书图文风格，画面精美，高质感，无水印。
prompt: Create a poster image for poster aimed at broad professional audience. Treat this as a design-led visual solving this brief: 目标：促收藏，给美甲师看的总结。 美甲笔记总结图，关键信息卡片风格。 用户需求：夏日蓝色猫眼短甲，适合黄皮，显白清透，小红书种草图文。 视觉简报：展示夏日蓝色猫眼短甲的视觉效果，强调适合黄皮肤色的显白清透效果，搭配短方圆形状，适合小红书种草分享。。 手型：自然亚洲女性手型。 肤色：黄皮。 甲型：短方圆。 甲长：短甲。 主色调：蓝色。 质感：猫眼。 光线：清透。 背景：夏日氛围。 风格：显白。 小红书图文风格，画面精美，高质感，无水印。. Communication goal: attract and persuade quickly in a campaign or recruitment context. Translate the brief into one strong hero concept rather than many equal-weight elements. Brand and context strategy: no explicit brand provided; commit to one coherent visual system instead of averaging styles. Visual system: base mode: editorial campaign key visual; direction bias: premium editorial, contemporary, polished, commercially strong; energy bias: energetic but disciplined, confident, professional; composition bias: clear hierarchy, dynamic but stable layout, deliberate focal contrast; palette bias: premium neutrals with one strong accent family. Hierarchy: one clear hero idea; one dominant hero visual or symbolic concept, never a collage of equal-weight objects; secondary elements must support the hero rather than compete with it; background should create rhythm, not narrative confusion. Composition: clear hierarchy, dynamic but stable layout, deliberate focal contrast. Safe zone: reserve a clean, obvious text-safe zone in the upper third or one side for headline and CTA copy. Lighting: crisp premium lighting with controlled contrast and energetic highlights. Color strategy: restricted premium palette with disciplined neutrals and one energetic accent family. Detail density: hero-detail emphasis with a restrained background; hero-rich detail with restrained background complexity. Style direction: base mode: editorial campaign key visual; direction bias: premium editorial, contemporary, polished, commercially strong; energy bias: energetic but disciplined, confident, professional; composition bias: clear hierarchy, dynamic but stable layout, deliberate focal contrast; palette bias: premium neutrals with one strong accent family. Mood: energetic but disciplined, confident, professional. Aspect ratio: 3:4. Important constraints: make the result feel campaign-ready rather than generic AI art; prioritize focal hierarchy and typography-safe composition. Avoid: avoid generic AI clutter; avoid random floating UI fragments or HUD overlays; avoid generic gradient fog with no composition logic; avoid cheap neon cyberpunk treatment unless explicitly requested; avoid noisy micro-detail that weakens the hierarchy; poster text rendered directly into the image unless explicitly requested; random marketing icons and decorative interface fragments. Emphasize strong hierarchy, intentional whitespace, disciplined background complexity, and polished professional finish.
